title: Crumble Topped Poblano Casserole
description: A delicious casserole combining the flavors of Mexico with a crunchy topping. This recipe serves 4-6 people and can be prepared in about an hour.
instructions: Roast the poblano peppers in the oven for 30 minutes, then peel and chop.
Saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the chopped poblano peppers, salsa, and cilantro to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the corn tortillas, crumble, and cheddar cheese.
Add the skillet mixture to the bowl and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with more crumble and cheese.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
